description: Eliminado último error ESLint (require → import en tailwind.config). Extraídos hooks y subcomponentes: useBookingActionsLogic (BookingActions), useReportDamageForm + DamageEvidenceSection (ReportDamageDialog), IncomeStatementTable + IncomeStatementToolbar (IncomeStatementReport), AddMaintenancePartForm (MaintenancePartsSection). Resultado: 0 errores ESLint, warnings reducidos de 50 a 45.
